trajectory_goal: Use GPT-5.4 to expand B1 with strong reusable hotpot-style multihop retrieval skills before later trajectory generation and SFT.
notes: B2 should preserve the useful B1 single-hop spine while adding bridge, comparison, and multihop verification skills supported by HotpotQA.
New multihop skills should have strict avoid conditions so they do not over-trigger on single-hop questions that B1 already handles well.
Prefer additions or targeted refinements that change search planning, evidence combination, or verification behavior in a reusable way.
